failure_reason: Added the concrete BML source-lowering layer in high-level BML: typed source declarations, a BMLSourceParser bootstrap adapter interface, typed carriers, a concrete declaration-lowering stage, and BMLCompilerSourceLoweringFlow wired into ModernBMLCompiler. Initial concrete proof returned 30 because the bootstrap parser exposed the interface shell but not ParseDeclarations; added narrowly scoped interface body parsing and method-signature parsing. Final concrete proof returns 31 across Go/Rust/TypeScript; source picture remains 42, carrier proof remains 41, BML compiler runtime remains 68, reference runtime remains 524488, and the original compiler picture remains 112251.
